ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., telescope, camera) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument (e.g., observatory, satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., photometric, spectroscopic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_sets" (
  "filter_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter set */,
  "filter_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter set record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter set record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_set_filter" (
  "filter_set_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the filter set */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the filter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_set_id", "filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "mjd" REAL /* Modified Julian Date of the observation */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band of the observation (e.g., ZTF_g, ZTF_r) */,
  "flux" REAL /* Flux measured during the observation */,
  "flux_err" REAL /* Error associated with the flux measurement */,
  "filter_set_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the filter set used */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instrument used */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., supernova, gamma-ray burst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_filter_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_set_id") REFERENCES filter_sets ("filter_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who accessed the observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the observation accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)
